candidate_definition_hints.text: One beautiful Ruby API for OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Bedrock, Azure, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Ollama, VertexAI, Perplexity, Mistral, xAI, GPUStack & OpenAI compatible APIs. Agents, Chat, Vision, Audio, PDF, Images, Embeddings, Tools, Streaming & Rails integration.
